metadata.description: Claude Code skills for AI-driven solo developers shipping npm packages.

plugins.name: release-solo-npm
plugins.description: Three skills for AI-driven solo dev shipping npm packages: /init-solo-npm scaffolds release.yml + publishConfig + .nvmrc on a fresh repo (public OR private registry). /release-solo-npm drives tag-triggered npm publishing with OIDC + provenance and one approval gate. /verify-solo-npm runs lint+test+build.
